scope.note: CORRIDOR/ROUTE ONLY request; this prep found eight high-confidence route duplicates and selected no corridor aliases because remaining same-name corridor groups carried scope/limit ambiguity.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM15 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.
Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM16 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.
Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM17 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.
Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM21 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.
Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM24 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.
Same global route in the Queensboro Bridge bus priority study context. Both records identify QM4 express service, with exact route_id match and express service variant/type agreement.

Same global route. Both records identify the Bx25 local route/new route serving northern Co-op City to Allerton Avenue/Bedford Park, with exact route_id match and local service variant/type agreement.
Same global route. Both records identify M23 local Manhattan Crosstown service in the M23 SBS planning context, with exact route_id match and local service variant/type agreement.

candidate_discovery.route_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select upper(coalesce(routes.route_id,'')) as route_id, coalesce(json_extract(records.payload,'$.service_variant'),'') as service_variant, coalesce(routes.route_type_normalized,'') as route_type_normalized, count(*) as n, group_concat(records.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records join routes on records.record_id=routes.record_id where records.record_kind='route' and coalesce(routes.route_id,'') != '' group by upper(routes.route_id), coalesce(json_extract(records.payload,'$.service_variant'),''), coalesce(routes.route_type_normalized,'') having n > 1 order by n desc, route_id limit 120;"
candidate_discovery.corridor_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'')) as name_key, count(*) as n, group_concat(records.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records join corridors on records.record_id=corridors.record_id where records.record_kind='corridor' and coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'') != '' group by lower(coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'')) having n > 1 order by n desc, name_key limit 120;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Route groups yielded the safest remaining candidates. Six selected pairs are exact Queensboro Bridge express-route duplicates left after earlier QBB route batches; two additional selected pairs have exact route_id and local service variant/type agreement. Corridor groups were inspected but skipped because remaining same-name candidates had materially different or ambiguous limits/scope risk.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, routes.route_id, json_extract(r.payload,'$.service_variant') as service_variant, routes.route_type_normalized, routes.route_name, routes.route_label, r.primary_source_id, (select count(*) from record_sources rs where rs.record_id=r.record_id) as source_count from records r join routes on r.record_id=routes.record_id where r.record_id in ('route_qm15-201110-qbb','route_qm15-qbb-study','route_qm16-201110-qbb','route_qm16-qbb-study','route_qm17-201110-qbb','route_qm17-qbb-study','route_qm21-201110-qbb','route_qm21-qbb-study','route_qm24-201110-qbb','route_qm24-qbb-study','route_qm4-201110-qbb','route_qm4-qbb-study','route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25','route_bx25-dec2021','route_m23-local-cb5','route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.count_command: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) from records where record_id in ('route_qm15-201110-qbb','route_qm15-qbb-study','route_qm16-201110-qbb','route_qm16-qbb-study','route_qm17-201110-qbb','route_qm17-qbb-study','route_qm21-201110-qbb','route_qm21-qbb-study','route_qm24-201110-qbb','route_qm24-qbb-study','route_qm4-201110-qbb','route_qm4-qbb-study','route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25','route_bx25-dec2021','route_m23-local-cb5','route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016') and record_kind='route';"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 16/16 selected alias and target records exist as record_kind=route. Route IDs and service variants/types match within each pair: QM15/express, QM16/express, QM17/express, QM21/express, QM24/express, QM4/express, Bx25/local, and M23/local.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_command: CAND="route_qm15-201110-qbb route_qm16-201110-qbb route_qm17-201110-qbb route_qm21-201110-qbb route_qm24-201110-qbb route_qm4-201110-qbb route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25 route_m23-local-cb5"; for id in $CAND; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '(.aliases["route"][$id] // empty) | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done
existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='route' and alias in ('route_qm15-201110-qbb','route_qm16-201110-qbb','route_qm17-201110-qbb','route_qm21-201110-qbb','route_qm24-201110-qbb','route_qm4-201110-qbb','route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25','route_m23-local-cb5');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_command: CAND="route_qm15-qbb-study route_qm16-qbb-study route_qm17-qbb-study route_qm21-qbb-study route_qm24-qbb-study route_qm4-qbb-study route_bx25-dec2021 route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016"; for id in $CAND; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '(.aliases["route"][$id] // empty) | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done; sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='route' and alias in ('route_qm15-qbb-study','route_qm16-qbb-study','route_qm17-qbb-study','route_qm21-qbb-study','route_qm24-qbb-study','route_qm4-qbb-study','route_bx25-dec2021','route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016');"
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_result: no output from both checks; selected targets are not themselves registered aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('route_qm15-201110-qbb','route_qm15-qbb-study'),('route_qm16-201110-qbb','route_qm16-qbb-study'),('route_qm17-201110-qbb','route_qm17-qbb-study'),('route_qm21-201110-qbb','route_qm21-qbb-study'),('route_qm24-201110-qbb','route_qm24-qbb-study'),('route_qm4-201110-qbb','route_qm4-qbb-study'),('route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25','route_bx25-dec2021'),('route_m23-local-cb5','route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='route' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs["route"][]? | select((.record_ids | index("route_qm15-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm15-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_qm16-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm16-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_qm17-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm17-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_qm21-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm21-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_qm24-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm24-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_qm4-201110-qbb") and index("route_qm4-qbb-study")) or (.record_ids | index("route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25") and index("route_bx25-dec2021")) or (.record_ids | index("route_m23-local-cb5") and index("route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity108.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-8]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="route" or .kind=="corridor") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["route_qm15-201110-qbb","route_qm16-201110-qbb","route_qm17-201110-qbb","route_qm21-201110-qbb","route_qm24-201110-qbb","route_qm4-201110-qbb","route_meeting-doc-79331-bx25","route_m23-local-cb5"] | index($a)) | [$f,.kind,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity108.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch108

source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Selected records carry source evidence for the same route labels and compatible service types: QM15/QM16/QM17/QM21/QM24/QM4 express routes in QBB documents, Bx25 local route/new route, and M23 local Manhattan Crosstown.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, git status, find, sed/head, test, date, rg, jq, and sqlite3; the only write was this prep artifact.
